title.rendered: 25+ Artificial Intelligence (AI) Marketing & Fundraising Statistics for Nonprofits

content.rendered: These AI marketing and fundraising statistics can help your inspire your nonprofit to adopt the use of generative AI for marketing and predictive AI fundraising. To learn more about AI, visit our AI Hub for Nonprofits and earn our Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising.

excerpt.rendered: AI enables nonprofits to increase fundraising revenue by optimizing donor engagement, predicting giving patterns, and personalizing outreach. These AI marketing and fundraising statistics can help your inspire your nonprofit into adopting generative and predictive AI.
